heroHeadline: Gaza Ceasefire Holds Tenuously: 75,000+ Dead, Last Hostage Returned, ICJ Counter-Memorial Filed
heroSubtitle: An October 2025 US-brokered ceasefire ended active Gaza combat, but has not ended the crisis: 75,000+ Palestinians killed, all 251 hostages taken Oct 7 now accounted for (last body returned early 2026), and Trump's 'Board of Peace' oversees Phase 2 reconstruction. Israel filed its ICJ genocide counter-memorial March 14, 2026. West Bank settler violence is at record pace, and UN OHCHR documents accelerating settlement expansion and forced displacement of 36,000+ Palestinians.
footerNote: Data sourced from UN OCHA, IDF, Gaza Ministry of Health, B'Tselem, ICC, ICJ, Reuters, Al Jazeera, OHCHR, Lancet Global Health, and institutional analyses. Casualty figures are subject to ongoing verification. The conflict has persisted since Israeli independence on May 14, 1948.
